auth.title: TRUEGRYND
auth.subtitle: No passwords. Just proof.
auth.magicLinkSentBody: We sent a sign-in link to {email}.

errors.magicLinkFailed: Failed to send magic link. Try again.
errors.magicLinkRateLimited: Too many attempts. Wait a few minutes, then try again.
errors.profileLoadFailed: Signed in, but we could not load your profile.

notFound.title: Not found
notFound.body: This page doesn’t exist. Go back to the Arena.

app.label: Error
app.title: Something broke
app.body: Try again. If it keeps happening, reload the page.

onboarding.title: ONBOARDING

identity.heading: Sports identity card
identity.copy: No cheating here. Your info defines your category.

initiation.heading: How it works
initiation.copy: Read this once. Then go earn your place.
initiation.subheading: This is not a tracker. It’s competition.

1.title: Challenges → score
1.body: Pick a challenge, submit a score (time or reps). Your score appears on the leaderboard.

2.title: Smart Proof (Top 10%)
2.body: Most scores are honor-based. If you hit Top 10%, you must paste a YouTube/TikTok link to validate.

3.title: Your next move
3.body: Choose a faction, then enter the Arena and post your first score.

errors.usernameMinLength: Username must be at least 2 characters.

onboarding.comingSoon: This flow is next. For now this page exists to validate auth redirects.
onboarding.body: Finish Issue #4 to collect biometrics, initiation, and faction.

app.overviewBody: Welcome back. Pick a challenge in the Arena and post a score.

comingSoon.title: Coming soon
comingSoon.body: This section is on the roadmap.

overview.weeklyEmpty: No weekly challenge scheduled. Check the Arena or come back Monday.
overview.factionNudgeBody: {faction} needs points today. Post a ranked score.
overview.noFactionBody: No faction on file. Complete onboarding.
overview.eventsEmpty: No active events right now. Check back soon.

clan.subtitle: Your faction is a weapon. Use it.
clan.warNoWeekly: No active weekly war. Standings below use recent ranked scores.
clan.yourFactionArenaAria: Go to Arena for your faction
clan.activeFighters: {count, plural, =0 {0 active fighters} =1 {1 active fighter} other {# active fighters}}
clan.emptyMembers: No ranked members yet. Be the first to post proof.

recruit.title: RECRUIT AN ALLY
recruit.shareText: Join {faction} on Truegrynd. Async fitness battles, no fluff.
recruit.shareTextContextual: Join {faction} {division} on Truegrynd. {weekly} is live — post a ranked score.

factionPage.recentProofSubtitle: Recent validated videos from the faction.

arena.title: ARENA
arena.subtitle: Pick your challenge. Post your score.
arena.empty: No challenges in the Arena yet.
arena.emptyHint: Propose one — community challenges go live after review.
arena.emptyLiveFeed: No live challenges in the public feed yet.
arena.pendingSectionHint: Only you see these until they're approved for the Arena.
arena.errorBody: We could not load the challenges.

create.title: NEW CHALLENGE
create.subtitle: Propose a challenge for the Arena. It unlocks after review.

fields.title: Title
fields.rulesDetailPlaceholder: Standards, range of motion, no-rep rules, tie-breaks…
fields.variantsHint: Pick at least one. These are ranked separately — not a shame mode.

scoring.helper: For time = fixed work, fastest wins (optional max time — slower scores are blocked). AMRAP = work window, most reps / rounds wins.
scoring.forTimeCapHint: Leave empty if any finish time counts. If set, times over this cannot be submitted.

circuit.helper: Pick movements from the catalog or choose "Other" for custom entries. At least 1 movement is required.

errors.generic: Could not create the challenge. Try again.

validation.descriptionMin: Pitch needs a bit more detail.
validation.rulesMax: Combined rules are too long (max 8000 characters).
validation.combinedMin: Add a circuit and/or enough standards — 40+ characters total.
validation.circuitAmountMissing: Enter reps or a hold time.
validation.circuitMinBlock: Add at least one movement with a valid amount.
validation.amrapCapMissing: Set a time cap for AMRAP (e.g. 10:00).
validation.forTimeCapInvalid: Use MM:SS for the max time (e.g. 15:00).
validation.forTimeCapZero: Max time must be longer than 0:00.
validation.variantsMin: Enable at least one official scaling lane.

challenge.notFoundBody: It may have been removed or unapproved.
challenge.ctaSubline: Opens the score form — nothing is saved until you submit.
challenge.variantsBody: Same challenge, different lanes. Rankings are per lane — pick yours and compete fairly.
challenge.pendingBody: Saved and in review. It will show up in the public feed once approved — then anyone can post a score.
challenge.rejectedBody: This challenge did not pass review. Create a new version or contact support.
challenge.maxTimeCap: Finish under {cap} — slower times cannot be submitted.

admin.title: UGC MOD QUEUE
admin.subtitle: Moderation vs Arena. In review → approve. Live = open in Arena. Done = closed. Rejected = blocked.

empty.arena_live: No challenges currently open in the Arena.

queue.tierLongGreen: Green — looks safe to publish after quick human check.
queue.tierLongRed: Red — unsafe, spam, or serious concern.

approveConfirm.bodySingle: This will publish « {title} » to the Arena.
approveConfirm.bodyBatchGreenOnly: Only rows already tagged green by AI will be approved; others stay pending.

weekly.title: WEEKLY CHALLENGE
weekly.subtitle: Link an approved challenge to a time window. No deploy needed.

events.title: MICRO-EVENTS
events.subtitle: Time-boxed async events (24h–30d) with 1–5 challenges. No deploy needed.

rejectModal.title: Reject challenge
rejectModal.reasonTooLongMax: Reason must be at most {max} characters.

errors.loadFailed: Could not load the moderation queue.
errors.analyzeNoSession: Sign in again to run AI scan.
errors.analyzeUnconfigured: AI scan is not configured: set secrets OPENAI_API_KEY (and optional OPENAI_MODEL) on Supabase for the Edge Function admin-challenge-ai-review.
errors.analyzeFailed: AI scan failed. Try again later.
errors.analyzeForbidden: You are not allowed to run AI scan.
errors.analyzeNotPending: Only pending challenges can be scanned.
errors.analyzeServerMisconfigured: Missing Supabase URL or anon key in the app environment.
errors.analyzePersistFailed: Could not save AI triage. Check the challenge is still pending.

proof.title: PROOF REVIEW
proof.subtitle: Reported scores — verify video and set proof level.
proof.empty: No reported scores in the queue.

errors.reasonTooShort: Reason must be at least 5 characters.
errors.generic: Could not submit report. Try again.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.empty: No validated scores yet. Be the first.

submission.title: SUBMIT YOUR SCORE
submission.proofBody: No video = saved but not ranked. Add a YouTube/TikTok link to get ranked.
submission.variantBody: Official scaling — ranked separately. Not a shame mode.
submission.resultSavedBody: Your score is saved. Add a video next time to appear on the leaderboard.
submission.resultRankedBody: Your score is validated and ranked on the leaderboard.

errors.videoInvalid: Video URL must be a YouTube or TikTok link.
errors.notApproved: Scores open only after this challenge is approved.
errors.exceedsTimeCap: That time is over this challenge's max. It does not count — do not submit.

leaderboard.title: EVENT LEADERBOARD
leaderboard.empty: No ranked scores in this division yet.

recap.title: FINAL STANDINGS
recap.subtitle: Top performers per division when the event closed.

hub.title: RIVAL MATCHES
hub.subtitle: Async 1v1 duels on 1–3 challenges. Same division only.
hub.invitesEmpty: No invites waiting. Start a duel or wait for a rival.

create.title: START A DUEL
create.subtitle: Pick up to 3 Arena challenges and invite a rival by username.

picker.title: CHALLENGES
picker.empty: No open Arena challenges right now.

invitee.label: RIVAL USERNAME
invitee.hint: They must be in your division to accept.

detail.title: MATCH DETAIL
detail.notFoundBody: This duel does not exist or you are not a participant.
detail.pendingHint: Waiting for rivals to accept before the window opens.
detail.noWinnerFinal: Final result: no winner — not all ranked scores were submitted.
detail.expiredHint: This invite expired before the duel started.
detail.finalizedHint: Final scores and winner are locked.
detail.pollingHint: Scores refresh every 30s while the match is live.

errors.generic: Could not complete this rival action. Try again.
errors.too_many_pending_invites_sent: You have too many pending invites. Wait for responses.
errors.invitee_too_many_pending: This rival has too many pending invites.
errors.division_mismatch: That user is not in your division.
errors.not_invited: You are not invited to this match.
errors.match_not_pending: This invite is no longer pending.

gymRequest.title: Train at a box?
gymRequest.body: Get your scores judge-verified — ask your gym to join TrueGrynd PRO.
gymRequest.thanksBody: Thanks! The more athletes ask, the sooner we bring your box on board.

comeback.body: You stepped away for {weeks, plural, one {# week} other {# weeks}}. No guilt — jump back in with one ranked score.
comeback.hint: Your faction war still counts. One proof video is enough to re-enter the fight.

rivalInvite.title: INVITE A RIVAL
rivalInvite.body: Share this link so a friend can accept your duel.
rivalInvite.shareText: I challenged you on Truegrynd. Accept the duel.

weeklyInvite.title: INVITE TO WEEKLY
weeklyInvite.body: Recruit allies for this week's challenge.
weeklyInvite.shareText: Join {faction} {division} on Truegrynd. This week's challenge is live.

finisher.title: FINISHER CARD
finisher.error: Could not load your finisher card.

public.subtitle: PUBLIC PROFILE
public.errorBody: This username does not exist or was removed.
public.passportHidden: This fighter hid their competitive passport. Only their header is visible.

signOut.label: LOG OUT
signOut.error: Could not sign out. Try again.

history.title: HISTORY
history.empty: No scores yet. Go earn one.

creatorScore.label: CR
creatorScore.tooltipBody: You earn +1 every time someone submits a validated score on a challenge you created. Max 10 per day.

rating.title: TRUEGRYND RATING
rating.explainer: Your global score blends challenge percentiles (validated scores only) with streak and recent activity. Higher rating unlocks division promotion.

passport.title: CHALLENGE PASSPORT
passport.subtitle: Your amateur competitive résumé — divisions, rating, highlights, and cards.

division.title: DIVISION
division.historyEmpty: No rating history yet. Submit validated scores to build your track record.

topScores.title: TOP SCORES BY AXIS
topScores.body: Best validated result per performance axis.
topScores.empty: No ranked scores yet. Post proof on a challenge to appear here.

weekly.title: WEEKLY BADGES
weekly.body: Global weekly challenges you completed with a ranked score.
weekly.empty: No weekly completions yet. Hit the current weekly from Overview.

rivals.title: RIVAL WINS
rivals.body: Async duels you won against rivals in your division.
rivals.empty: No rival wins yet. Start a duel from Rivals.

share.title: SHARE PASSPORT
share.body: Copy your public profile link. Toggle sections below to control what visitors see.
share.noUsername: Set a username in Settings to share your public passport.

privacy.title: PUBLIC VISIBILITY
privacy.body: Choose what appears on your public profile link. Your private passport always shows everything.

cosmetics.title: FINISHER STYLES
cosmetics.body: Premium card frames for your shares — same score, louder look. Help us pick what ships first.
cosmetics.noPayToWin: Rank and leaderboard access stay free. Cosmetics change visuals only.

historyPage.title: MY HISTORY
historyPage.challengeFilterBanner: Showing attempts for this challenge only.

actions.videoInvalid: Must be a YouTube or TikTok link.

empty.all: No history yet. Hit the Arena.
empty.in_progress: No challenges in progress. Tap I'M IN on a challenge to start.
empty.validated: No validated scores yet. Post proof to rank.
empty.won: No wins yet. Rank top 10% or crush an official challenge.

passport.title: Edit my passport
passport.body: Keep your category data accurate for fair leaderboards.
passport.locationBody: Used for local and national leaderboard presets. No GPS — you choose what to share.
passport.showLocationLabel: Show my city on leaderboard rows (off by default)

gym.title: My gym
gym.body: Link your physical box for local Inter-Gym league standings.
gym.comingSoon: Gym linking arrives with Truegrynd V3 (Inter-Gym league).

data.title: Data management
data.deleteConfirmBody: Full account deletion is processed manually for now. Contact privacy@truegrynd.com after confirming to complete GDPR removal within 30 days.
data.deletePending: Deletion request noted. Email privacy@truegrynd.com from your account email to finalize.

footer.logoutHint: Log out ends your session on this device.

pro.title: Gym command center
pro.subtitle: Validate scores, run competitions and manage your box — all in one place.

dashboard.intro: Welcome to your PRO space. The Judge Console arrives next — the rest is on the way.

judge.intro: Validate performances you witnessed on the floor — a validated score jumps to the verified ranking.

billing.noGym: Create your gym first to manage billing.
billing.plan: TrueGrynd GYM PRO — 100/mo. Validation, events, TV cast, leagues.
billing.gateBody: Your gym's TrueGrynd GYM PRO subscription is inactive. Subscribe to restore validation, events, TV cast and leagues.
billing.note: Billing is handled securely by Stripe. Cancel anytime from the portal.

leagues.intro: Opt your gym into leagues to compete against other boxes.
leagues.standingsSoon: Box-vs-box matches and standings are coming next.

detail.intro: Member boxes ranked by their athletes' average rating.
detail.note: Score = average of each box's members' global rating. Shared-WOD matches are coming next.

events.intro: Competitions you run for your gym.
events.empty: No events yet. Create your first competition.

detail.noStandings: Standings will appear once the event is set up.
detail.submitted: Score submitted — it's in the standings and the Judge queue.

pacing.title: Pacing assistant
pacing.basis: Based on your Engine {engine} vs a {benchmark} benchmark — a guide, not a limit.
pacing.emptyStaff: Set a benchmark finish + segments to give each athlete a personalized pace.
pacing.invalid: Enter a valid time (mm:ss) and segment count.

tv.listIntro: Cast a live leaderboard on your gym's screen.
tv.listEmpty: No live or upcoming events to cast.

create.title: Create an event
create.subtitle: Set the window and build the workout — your members compete on it.
create.error: Could not create the event — try again.
create.endsAfterStart: The end must be after the start.

createGym.title: Create your gym
createGym.intro: TrueGrynd PRO is for verified businesses. Enter your company's SIRET or SIREN — we check it against the French business registry and set up your gym.
createGym.siretHint: 14 digits (SIRET) or 9 (SIREN) — found on your Kbis or any invoice.
createGym.moat: Every gym on TrueGrynd maps to a real, verified company — that's what keeps the ranking credible.
createGym.ctaBody: You don't have a gym yet. Create yours to unlock judging, events and member management.

error.invalid_siret: Enter a valid SIRET (14 digits) or SIREN (9 digits).
error.company_not_found: No company found for this number. Check the digits.
error.company_closed: This company is registered as closed.
error.gym_already_claimed: A gym already exists for this company.
error.registry_unreachable: The business registry is unreachable right now — try again shortly.
error.registry_error: The business registry returned an error — try again shortly.
